name: Chocolate Upside Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and mix it with the condensed milk until combined.
2. Line greased pans with paper and grease the paper.
3. Pour the chocolate mixture into the pans and allow to cool.
4. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
5. Cream the shortening with sugar until fluffy.
6. Add eggs and vanilla, beating thoroughly.
7. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients and milk in small amounts, beating after each addition.
8. Pour the batter carefully over the chocolate mixture.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes.
10. Makes 2 (8 inch) layers. Optionally, add 1/2 cup chopped nuts to the chocolate mixture or sprinkle 1/2 cup shredded coconut on top.
